case_title: DIANE DEFOREST VS. PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DIANE DEFOREST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FELL APART. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEFOREST, DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,545.00, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-01-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-04-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIANE DEFOREST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS THE ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAMES GREENHILL, PRESIDENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT HEARING. THE DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AND PLAINTIFF DIANE DEFOREST WILL ENTER INTO AN AGREEMENT FROM THIS DATE FORWARD, MAY-26-2021, TO OBEY ALL CALIFORNIA STATE LAWS LAID OUT IN THE DAVIS STIRLING ACT, CCR'S, BYLAWS, AND HOUSE RULES. THIS ORDER MEMORIALIZES THAT THIS AGREEMENT WILL BE ADOPTED BY THE BOARD. IF IT IS ADOPTED THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG-4TH HEARING IF THE AGREEMENT BREAKS DOWN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEFOREST, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 DECLARATION ATTACHED. FILED BY DEFOREST, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKHILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
